stemHtml:
Refer to the following NOTAM and choose the corresponding answer:

SVC TEMPO TWR LCL TFC/CLRNC DELIVERY 121.0 FRI-SAT 1311131400 - 1311141500EST

options.a: The tower will be available except on Fridays and Saturdays.
options.b: Temporarily an additional frequency 121.0 will be available.
options.c: A temporary tower service will be available for controlling local traffic and clearance delivery on freq 121.0, from Friday 13th at 14 00 to Saturday 14th at 15 00.
options.d: The tower will be controlling traffic and clearance delivery will be available on 121.0
